SEQUENCE.COMMENT: padContent - pads content1 -> content9 using PAD_STRING and PAD_LENGTH
note that PAD_STRING can contain any number of characters, although it normally
should only be a single character - it can also be set to the explicit value SPACE
the default EOL string is \r\n and can be overridden using OPT_EOL

BRANCH.COMMENT: fail if PAD_STRING or PAD_LENGTH are not supplied

INVOKE.NAME: sPadString == ''
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0000 PAD_STRING parameter is required - please provide a PAD_STRING component parameter, set to a single character, or the explicit value SPACE

Values.value: FE0000 PAD_STRING parameter is required - please provide a PAD_STRING component parameter, set to a single character, or the explicit value SPACE

INVOKE.NAME: sPadLength == ''
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0000 PAD_LENGTH parameter is required - please provide a PAD_LENGTH component parameter, set to a numeric value

Values.value: FE0000 PAD_LENGTH parameter is required - please provide a PAD_LENGTH component parameter, set to a numeric value

BRANCH.COMMENT: change explicit SPACE to a space character

INVOKE.COMMENT: About to start padding %sContentIn% using '%sPadString%' to a length of %sPadLength% characters

Values.value: About to start padding %sContentIn% using '%sPadString%' to a length of %sPadLength% characters

INVOKE.COMMENT: %sContentIn% was found to have %record_count% records, pad starting

Values.value: %sContentIn% was found to have %record_count% records, pad starting

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether we should pad, if its the last record

SEQUENCE.NAME: $iteration >= '%record_count%' && record_length=='0'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if this is the last record and its a length of 0, then skip padding this record

INVOKE.COMMENT: %record_count% records successfully padded (and truncated) to %sPadLength% characters

Values.value: %record_count% records successfully padded (and truncated) to %sPadLength% characters
